import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut have = false
  mut neg = false
  mut cur = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 45
      neg = true
    else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      have = true
    else
      if have
        if neg
          result = list.push(result, -cur)
        else
          result = list.push(result, cur)
        end
        have = false
        neg = false
        cur = 0
      else
        neg = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if have
    if neg
      result = list.push(result, -cur)
    else
      result = list.push(result, cur)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn remove_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    if i != idx
      let v = match xs.get(i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      result = list.push(result, v)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_desc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut result = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    let m = match list.max(remaining)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    result = list.push(result, m)
    let idx = match list.index_of(remaining, m)
    when Some(i)
      i
    when None
      0
    end
    remaining = remove_at(remaining, idx)
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let xs = parse_ints(line1)
let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(x)
  x
when None
  0
end

let sorted = sort_desc(xs)
let total = sorted.len()
let take = if k < total
  k
else
  total
end

mut out = ""
mut i = 0
while i < take
  let v = match sorted.get(i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if i == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println(out)
